infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CAST uses your camera to identify fish species using AI.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CAST accesses your photos so you can log your catches.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CAST uses your location to show nearby fishing spots and local weather conditions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CAST uses your location to show nearby fishing spots and local weather conditions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CAST may use the microphone when recording catch videos.

web.name: CAST — Fishing App | AI Fish ID, Spots & Catch Log
web.description: AI-powered fish identification, 10,000+ worldwide fishing spots, weather conditions, tides and catch logging. The ultimate fishing companion.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow CAST to access your camera to identify fish.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow CAST to access your photos to log catches.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow CAST to access your location for fishing spots and weather.
